description: Optimize the SEO metadata for two products in the WooCommerce store. Update the 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) by changing its URL Slug to 'organic-fair-trade-tee' and its Product Short Description to 'Sustainably sourced, 100% organic cotton tee with a comfortable relaxed fit. Fair Trade Certified.' Update the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001) by changing its URL Slug to 'premium-anc-headphones' and its Product Short Description to 'Industry-leading active noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life and plush ear cushions.'
